text:
management demonstration project 
A = Lock-in, CMS to process provider claims 
B = Lock-in, GHO to process in plan Part A and in area Part B claims 
C = Lock-in, GHO to process all provider claims 

COMMENT: Historically, most Medicare managed care plans have been health maintenance organizations (HMOs), 
hence the name of the variable. 

Starting with MBSF ABCD V2, the values were expanded to distinguish between months enrolled 
without HMO coverage (‘0’) and months not enrolled in Medicare
